name: amethyst
description: A modern, responsive single-page website designed for Amethyst - a physiotherapy clinic.   The project emphasizes clean UI, performance, and maintainability using semantic HTML, SCSS, and modern JavaScript.

scripts.sass:verify: npm run sass && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const css=fs.readFileSync('src/assets/css/main.css','utf8'); if(!css.includes('.geriatric-showcase-copy h1')) throw new Error('Expected compiled geriatric showcase h1 rule was not found in main.css'); console.log('Verified main.css contains the compiled geriatric showcase h1 rule.');"
